meaning: n.职业妇女的互助福利俱乐部
examples: Since 2003 Zonta has been a test driver with Toyota, who this season have been running Bridgestone tyres.
During that time, he was merely an ordinary driver, and if nothing had been changed he would have been the same kind of driver as Ricardo Zonta.
Toyota's Ricardo Zonta was the quickest of the test drivers finishing in 14th place.
The crisis began on Friday after Toyota drivers Schumacher and Ricardo Zonta crashed at the same spot on the final bend.
BAR's Takuma Sato was fourth with a 1:18.540 lap, followed by Toyota test driver Ricardo Zonta, BAR tester Anthony Davidson and Williams' other test driver Antonio Pizzonia.
